Expect $$(`~message-local`)[6].$(`~link-embed`).$(`~embed-details`).$(`-ios class chain:**/XCUIElementTypeStaticText`) to have text containing

Expected: "Discover the innovative world of Apple and shop everything iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, Mac, and Apple TV, plus explore accessories, entertainment, and expert device support."
Received: "Apple has celebrated MLK Day with a Homepage Takeover since 2015 to honor the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr."
Chat User - Chat Messages containing links contents on local side
